rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Mtn To Set Aside And Vacate Request For Dismissal And Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to breach of fiduciary relationship and fraud sustained without leave to amend. Demurrer as to 3rd cause of action, intentional tort is overruled. (AJR/MD)/(CW)

rulings.Case Title: ALLEY VS BROWN AND WILLIAMSON TOBACCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Or Stay Or Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: (DEFT BROWN & WILLIAMSON MTN TO QUASH) GRANT MOTION TO QUASH. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (CW)
GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HAYTER X-DEFTS MUST ACTUALLY SET THEIR PETITION FOR HEARING.
MOTION TO INTERVENE DENIED - NO SHOWING OF ADEQUATE GROUNDS FOR INTERVENTION. (NR)

rulings.Case Title: STIMMEL, STIMMEL & VS DOUBLE WOOD INVEST
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DOUBLE WOOD NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING. MOTION BY STIMMEL, STIMMEL & SMITH FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT DENIED. (AL/FLTR)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION (Demurrer To) To Strike First Amended Complaint For Actual And Punitive Damages; Deft'S Berkowitz And Grant Bldg. Co., Llc.'S Demurrer To And Motion To Strike Plntf'S First Amended Complaint For Actua
rulings.Rulings: 1st cause of action Bad Faith Breach of Oral and Written Agreements: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to clarify elements of contract and breach etc with respect to each landlord. 2nd cause of action Bad Faith Breach of Fiduciary Duty: SUSTAIN without leave to amend. 3rd cause of action Breach of Warranty of "Tenantability" (contract): SUSTAIN without leave to amend doctrine does not apply to commercial leases. 4th cause of action Breach of Warranty of "Tenantability" (tort): SUSTAIN without leave to amend doctrine does not apply to commercial leases. 5th cause of action Negligent Maintenance of Property: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to clarify existence of duty, breach, causation and damages as to each landlord 6th cause of action Willfully Negligent Failure to repair and maintain elevators: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to clarify existence of duty, breach, causation and damages as to each landlord 7th cause of action Promise without Intent to Perform: SUSTAIN with leave to amend to allege fraud with requisite specificity, especially as to corporate defendants, authority of speakers to make representations, etc. 8th cause of action Breach of Statutory Duty under Civil?1955: SUSTAIN without leave to amend. 9th cause of action Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress: SUSTAIN without leave to amend. Paragraph 40 for Punitive Damages: GRANT without leave to amend. Paragraph 66 for Punitive Damages: Moot because demurrer sustained without leave. Paragraph 82 for Punitive Damages: GRANT without leave to amend. Paragraph D and E in Prayer for Punitive Damages: GRANT without leave to amend. (CW)
